## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check app.js` passes
- [ ] Opened `index.html` and clicked through the flow I touched
- [ ] No em dashes in copy (use `·`, commas, or colons)
- [ ] Updated `PLAN.md` if a product decision changed
- [ ] No secrets/keys committed
